parity_goal: Preserve a standalone best-effort cross-app context sweep that uses Superhuman for sent work email, writes deduped timestamp-true daily-note log entries, and advances checkpoints per source only after successful writes.
behavior_signature_after: Router + nodes keep the standalone sweep contract, honest best-effort source handling, deterministic daily-note writes, and per-source checkpoint advancement.

expected_output_shape: best-effort Superhuman Slack Notion CRM Codex sweep
direct write into the configured daily note log
override lower bound applied to this run
honest best-effort limits for Notion and CRM
